design_philosophy: A calm, earthy, and highly functional dashboard prioritizing minimal information density, progressive disclosure, and clear operational context for a plant store. Uses warm off-whites, moss greens, and subtle typography to maintain a grounded and natural feel.

headings.usage: Used for page titles, card headers, and KPI values. Use tight tracking for larger sizes.

body.usage: Used for data tables, secondary text, and labels.

hierarchy_rules: H1 (Dashboard Title): text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter text-stone-900
H2 (Section Header): text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-stone-800
H3 (Card Title): text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase text-stone-500
KPI Value: text-4xl font-light tracking-tighter text-stone-800

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. The dashboard should feel breathable, not cluttered.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento-style Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap should be gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content and tables. KPI cards should have left-aligned text with an icon on the top right.

components.cards: Flat solid surfaces. border border-[#E8E6E1] rounded-xl shadow-sm. No heavy shadows. Hover: slight shadow-md.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#4A5D23] text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium hover:bg-[#3B4A1C] transition-colors. Secondary: bg-white border border-[#E8E6E1] text-[#2D312E] hover:bg-stone-50.
components.tables: Shadcn UI tables with generous cell padding (p-4). Use subtle border-b for rows. Header text uppercase, text-xs, tracking-wider.
components.badges: Rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold. Use soft background with darker text for status.
components.navigation: Sidebar with glassmorphism or solid warm gray background. Use Phosphor Icons for links.
components.charts: Thin-line charts or softly filled area charts using Recharts. Use primary accent color (#4A5D23) and soft gray for reference lines.

motion.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow increase on cards. Color darkening on buttons.
motion.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for interactive elements.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use Duotone or Regular weights for a premium SaaS feel.

inventory_products.description: green potted plants on brown wooden seat
red and green leaves on white background
green plant on white ceramic pot

backgrounds.description: indoor tree and cactus near windowpane

avatars.description: grayscale photo of woman wearing necklace and top
shallow focus photography of woman outdoor during day

testing_requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid="add-plant-button".
instructions_to_main_agent: Use Manrope for Headings and Figtree for Body. Add them via Google Fonts in index.html.
Install Phosphor Icons with yarn add @phosphor-icons/react.
The application should be SPA in React with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI. Use .js files, not .tsx.
Build a robust Dashboard layout with a left Sidebar (navigation) and main content area.
Dashboard sections needed: Overview (Metrics & Charts), Inventory (List of plants), Sales/Billing, Customers.
Use the provided image URLs for plant thumbnails in the inventory list and customer avatars in the customer list.
Implement Recharts for the main sales/inventory trends chart in the overview.
Ensure all text is in Spanish as requested ('Inventario', 'Ventas', 'Clientes', etc.).
Adhere to the E1 spacing rules: generously padded cards (p-6 or p-8) and soft, earthy color palettes.
